response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-relevant tools, plus strong architecture and DevOps exposure, but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) far exceeds the entry-level requirement, and his German language barrier and high on-site presence requirement in Berlin pose significant operational risks.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and fullstack experience across React, Node.js, and REST APIs
Proven track record in scalable systems, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes
Strong architectural mindset and open-source contributions align with clean code values
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role; likely to leave quickly or demand senior compensation
German language proficiency is only basic, conflicting with high on-site collaboration needs
Long career history suggests possible misalignment with junior team dynamics or mentorship expectations
